conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl Franzens University, 8010 Graz, Austria
conditions.evidence_text: At the CAP for PEG on a normal-phase column (Nucleosil 100-5 OH in 78 wt% acetone)... Fig. 1 Elution of poly(ethylene glycol) (PEG)... at the critical adsorption point (CAP) for ethylene oxide (EO)
conditions.detector: DDS70 density detector, RI 2414 or SEDEX 45 ELSD
conditions.notes: Used to analyze PPG, PCL, and block copolymers where EO is critical.

conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl Franzens University, 8010 Graz, Austria
conditions.evidence_text: Critical conditions for PO... can be realized on the Jordi column in 90 wt% acetone... but also in THF–water. For PBO, a CAP exists on the Jordi column in 84.5 wt% THF (Fig. 4)... Fig. 4 Critical conditions for PPG on the Jordi RP column in tetrahydrofuran (THF)–water
conditions.detector: DDS70 density detector, RI 2414 or SEDEX 45 ELSD
conditions.notes: Text mentions 84.5 wt% THF for PBO CAP on Jordi, but Fig 4 caption and text context link this to PPG/PO critical conditions on Jordi in THF-water. The text explicitly states 'Critical conditions for PO... on the Jordi column... in THF–water'.

conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl Franzens University, 8010 Graz, Austria
conditions.evidence_text: For PBO... on the Prodigy column in above 90 wt% THF (Fig. 5). It is interesting to note that at very high THF concentrations PBO no longer goes in the exclusion regime but is more or less critical (from 88 to 95 wt% THF)
conditions.detector: DDS70 density detector, RI 2414 or SEDEX 45 ELSD
conditions.notes: Text indicates critical behavior in range 88-95 wt% THF, with 90 wt% being the lower bound mentioned for 'above 90'.

conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl Franzens University, 8010 Graz, Austria
conditions.evidence_text: For PHO, a CAP is observed on the Jordi column at 87 wt% THF, as can be seen in Fig. 6. In such a mobile phase various PHOs with different degrees of polymerization are eluted at the same volume.
conditions.detector: DDS70 density detector, RI 2414 or SEDEX 45 ELSD
conditions.notes: Used to analyze EO-HO block copolymers.

conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl Franzens University, 8010 Graz, Austria
conditions.evidence_text: A completely different situation is observed on the Spherisorb S5P column in 90 wt % methanol–water: in such a mobile phase PPG is eluted at the CAP, while PEG is eluted in LAC mode (see Fig. 9)!
conditions.detector: DDS70 density detector, RI 2414 or SEDEX 45 ELSD
conditions.notes: Used to analyze EO-PO block copolymers where PO is critical and EO is adsorbing.
